name: ratel-local
description: Persistent project-scoped Ratel gateway for exposing curated upstream MCP tools through search_capabilities and invoke_tool.

interface.shortDescription: Expose scoped MCP tools through one persistent local daemon
interface.longDescription: Ratel Local connects each Codex project to an isolated gateway hosted by one persistent local daemon. It searches and invokes configured upstream MCP tools while keeping agent tool surfaces small and upstream connections reusable.
defaultPrompt: Use Ratel Local to find the right tool for this task
Set up or check my Ratel Local daemon
Import my Codex MCP servers into Ratel
Review my Ratel tool usage and suggest improvements
